_description: Building sustainability metrics — energy and cost impacts
_sources: Akbari et al. 2001: 2.6x electricity in full sun vs full shade
Sacramento study: 30% cooling reduction, 0.6-0.8 kW peak demand savings
Chicago study: Single 25ft tree west = 7% cooling, east = 5%

maintenance.note: Maintenance estimates are approximate ranges based on industry benchmarks, not from specific studies

airQualityHealth.source: Nowak et al. 2014 (air quality improvements from pollutant removal)
